title: Crown Back Banquet Chair with Arms - Carbon Weave Vinyl with Onyx Frame
features: Precision Engineering: Constructed with double-support bracing and an 18-gauge steel frame for maximum structural integrity in high-traffic zones.
Superior Fabric Durability: The Carbon Weave upholstery features a high-rub count, making it ideal for the friction and frequent cleaning typical of churches and busy event halls.
Floor & Stack Protection: Equipped with non-marring floor glides to protect hardwood and polished concrete, plus clear bumper guards to prevent frame-on-frame scratching.
Facility Friendly: The crown back includes an integrated hand-hold, allowing your setup crew to move and reconfigure seating layouts with speed and ease.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 50 or more
